content: Hey, I'm Frankie, and I'm a robotics researcher at MIT. I recently moved to Raleigh, NC, and I'm looking to meet new people. I'm thinking of hosting a dinner party and inviting some of my colleagues and friends. Maybe we can have some Japanese cuisine, I love sushi!

That sounds like a great idea! Japanese cuisine is always a hit, and it's a great way to bring people together. How many people are you thinking of inviting, and have you thought about any fun activities or games to play during the dinner party?

I'm thinking of inviting around 10 people, and I've been thinking of having a photo booth set up, since I'm really into photography. I've also been trying to get into surfing, but it's been tough to find time with my new job. My border collie, Ziggy, has been keeping me company though!

That sounds like a blast! A photo booth is always a great idea, and I'm sure your guests will love it. And it's great that you have Ziggy to keep you company, dogs can be such great companions. Have you thought about hosting any outdoor events, like a hike or a mountain biking trip, since you mentioned you're interested in those activities?
